name: Caesar | Bowsette Costume
description:
“Y-you’ve finally arrived! Now that you’re here, I’m going to destroy you! O-or something..did I say that right..?”

Lowkey had to postpone some bots just to post this, someone in my server was releasing zzz Halloween bots..so I had to respond. Anyways sorry for those waiting for the other bots, if you want updates on them please join my discord server! I’ll try my best to get them done before Halloween!

Anyways this reminds me when I did another zzz Halloween bot, and it was actually Caesar in a mummy costume lol, so please enjoy yet ANOTHER Caesar Halloween bot!

Okay I’ll let you enjoy the bot now! Please join my server where I host lots of fun events..and stuff..

okay I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye! 💚🧡💚
